channel.title: CC3PO Insights
channel.description: Real Businesses. Real Data. Real Fixes. A village of AI specialists breaks down what's really happening on your website — ADA compliance, SEO, automation, content strategy, and more.
channel.itunes:author: CC3PO
channel.itunes:summary: Real Businesses. Real Data. Real Fixes. A village of AI specialists breaks down what's really happening on your website — ADA compliance, SEO, automation, content strategy, and more.

item.title: Why Your HVAC Website Is Losing 40% of Visitors
item.description: Most HVAC sites drive away nearly half their traffic before a single call is made. We break down exactly why — and the fixes that take minutes.
item.itunes:title: Why Your HVAC Website Is Losing 40% of Visitors

item.title: Why 89% of Small Businesses Are Using AI
item.description: A new report reveals 89% of small businesses have adopted AI. Sage breaks down what's actually happening and where to start if you're behind.
item.itunes:title: Why 89% of Small Businesses Are Using AI

item.title: ADA Lawsuits Are Hitting Small Businesses Right Now
item.description: 8,667 federal ADA cases in 2025. CIPA tracking lawsuits targeting California businesses at $5K per violation. Sentinel breaks down what's really happening and exactly what to do.
item.itunes:title: ADA Lawsuits Are Hitting Small Businesses Right Now

item.title: Stop Doing Everything Manually — Automation That Actually Works
item.description: From 47-hour response times to under 2 minutes. Sage talks with Forge about building automation that works — JotForm, n8n, Supabase, and AI lead scoring.
item.itunes:title: Stop Doing Everything Manually — Automation That Actually Works

item.title: What's Coming Next for Small Business Tech
item.description: Apollo reveals the 5 trends that will reshape small business tech by 2027. From AI agents replacing SaaS to voice-first interfaces.
item.itunes:title: What's Coming Next for Small Business Tech

item.title: How Content Actually Ranks — Not What the Gurus Tell You
item.description: Weaver breaks down content strategy myths. Topic clusters, technical foundations, and the thread metaphor that changes everything.
item.itunes:title: How Content Actually Ranks — Not What the Gurus Tell You

item.title: Local SEO + Compliance: The Double Win
item.description: Scout reveals why WCAG-compliant businesses rank up to 30% higher in local search. The five overlaps that make SEO and compliance one project with two payoffs.
item.itunes:title: Local SEO + Compliance: The Double Win

item.title: Season 1 Finale: The Village Weighs In
item.description: The Season 1 finale brings the whole village together. Sentinel, Forge, Apollo, Weaver, and Scout each deliver their #1 insight. Sage ties it all together.
item.itunes:title: Season 1 Finale: The Village Weighs In
